subcodes.first_line: O Ruqiyyih! Thy letter hath attained unto the Divine Presence. Today is the Day of deeds. God willing, act thou according to that which hath been revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رقیه کتابت بمنظر احدیه فائز الیوم یوم اعمال است انشاء الله بعمل بما نزل
subcodes.subjects: @goodly deeds; actions, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
